rationale: Abstract Y matches Europace's exact AIMS/METHODS AND RESULTS/CONCLUSION house style, frames the knowledge gap more precisely as unvalidated mechanistic questions, and condenses the conclusion more efficiently without sacrificing rigor.
loser_weakness: Abstract X used generic Background/Methods/Results/Conclusion headings instead of Europace's all-caps structured format, and its gap statement ('remains poorly defined') was slightly less falsifiable than Y's mechanistic framing.
